senses.gloss: afreet, afrit, 'afrit, efreet, ifreet, ifrit; Supernatural being from Arabian folklore.
demon, devil, fiend, evil spirit; Any infernal being regardless of its morals.
goblin, sprite, genie, gremlin, elf; Any supernatural being in general.

etymology.text: From a Middle Iranian past participle āfrīd (“created”), originally an elliptic expression for *dīw afrīt (“demon’s creation”), or from the root ع ف ر (ʕ f r) related to “ash”, compare for the derivation type عَكْرُوت (ʕakrūt, “scoundrel”).
